Comment.value: This script cna be called from BOTH FAT Texts and FAT Texts Translated

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gCurrentLocalisationCode ) And FAT Title::gCurrentLocalisationCode ≠ FAT Title::Original localisation code
"The text could not be found in the Title."

Comment.value: Omit empty original records. Do this as a last step since it is a related field to improve performance

Calculation.Text: "The text could not be found in the Title."

Comment.value: Search only in a specific package

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gCurrentLocalisationCode ) And FAT Title::gCurrentLocalisationCode ≠ FAT Title::Original localisation code
"The text could not be found in the Package. Clear selected package to search text in the whole Title."

Comment.value: Omit empty original records. Do this as a last step since it is a related field to improve performance
Sorting using value list = Package makes empty package ids come in the end = Global texts

Calculation.Text: "The text could not be found in the Package. Clear selected package to search text in the whole Title."

Comment.value: Sorting using value list = Package makes empty package ids come in the end = Global texts
